context: Checkpoint 2026-06-28. Workspace namespace policy is now executable: refarm.config.json declares current root namespaces, @refarm.dev/config normalizes workspaceNamespaces, and health/check report undeclared versioned root namespace drift as warnings first. launch-process tarball handoff regenerated for vault-seed consumer review.
current_tasks: Commit ab71c9bc feat(health): warn on undeclared workspace namespaces.

Validation passed: pnpm -C packages/config run test -- workspace-namespaces-config; pnpm -C packages/health run test -- project; pnpm -C apps/refarm exec vitest run test/commands/health.test.ts test/commands/check.test.ts --maxWorkers=1; pnpm -C apps/refarm run type-check; pnpm -C packages/launch-process run test; pnpm -C packages/launch-process run build; refarm check --next-action --json.
Tarball handoff: /workspaces/refarm/vault-seed/vendor/refarm.dev-launch-process-0.1.0.tgz. This artifact is intentionally left uncommitted.
blockers: refarm agent finish --lane after-edit/after-commit --run --json emitted no output and was interrupted to avoid container pressure; refarm check passed afterwards.
next_actions: Investigate why agent finish lanes can hang silently and make them resource-bounded/cache-aware.
Continue naming audit/split before publish: avoid Refarm-branded terms in SDK surfaces that should be provider/product neutral.
Use cached downstream checkout only when a consumer-proof is needed; otherwise keep advancing Refarm package readiness in-repo.
key_decisions_active: DEC-031: host unificado refarm com renderers TUI/Web/headless sobre contratos compartilhados.
DEC-032: produto CLI/host em apps/; packages/ guardam blocos reutilizáveis.
DEC-034: artefatos WASM Rust devem ser copiados para dist/ durante build.
DEC-035: provision para, configure ainda não existe — silo é o ponto de integração.
DEC-036 [DECIDED]: refarm chat é cliente HTTP do sidecar farmhand em :42001. Não embeda farmhand.
ADR-064 [ACCEPTED]: TokenAuthError com provider + reason + rotationUrl — produzido na camada de credenciais, renderizado por qualquer superfície.
ADR-065 [ACCEPTED]: Farmhand transparent lifecycle — refarm é o single entry point. Auto-start com Y/n confirm, detached spawn, 300ms poll. LaunchDeps interface para testabilidade.
